# VBM Interior

> VBM Interior is a Chennai-based interior design company founded in 2017 by Mohan Kumar S, with 200+ completed projects and 30+ technical professionals. We specialize in residential and commercial interior design with up to 10-year warranty, 1-year free maintenance, and packages from Standard to Luxury.

## Important Notes

- Location: Arumbakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Founded: 2017 by Mohan Kumar S
- Experience: 8+ years
- Projects Completed: 200+
- Team: 30+ technical professionals
- Warranty: Up to 10 years (Standard 5yr, Premium 7yr, Luxury 10yr)
- Free maintenance: 1 year included
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google (6 reviews)
- Free initial consultation available
- Tagline: "PRECISION. PERFECTION.. PROMISE..."

## Services

- [Living Room Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Custom furniture, color schemes, lighting design, space optimization
- [Bedroom Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Wardrobe design, ambient lighting, storage solutions, luxury finishes
- [Kitchen Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Modular kitchen solutions, appliance integration, storage optimization
- [Complete Interior Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): End-to-end design from space planning to project management
- [Office & Commercial Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Workspace planning, ergonomic furniture, brand integration
- [Furniture Design](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Custom furniture, material selection, space-specific designs

## Packages & Pricing

- **Standard Package** (5-year warranty): 2BHK ₹3–4L | 3BHK ₹5–6L
- **Premium Package** (7-year warranty): 2BHK ₹4–6L | 3BHK ₹7–9L
- **Luxury Package** (10-year warranty): 2BHK ₹7–10L | 3BHK ₹10–13L

## Pages

- [Home](https://vbminterior.com/): VBM Interior homepage — overview of services and portfolio
- [About Us](https://vbminterior.com/about/): Company history, team, values, and design process
- [Services](https://vbminterior.com/services/): Full list of interior design services offered
- [Portfolio](https://vbminterior.com/portfolio/): Gallery of completed residential and commercial projects
- [Blog](https://vbminterior.com/blog/): Interior design tips, trends, and inspiration articles
- [Contact Us](https://vbminterior.com/contact/): Get a free consultation or request a quote

## Blog

- [Interior Design Trends 2026](https://vbminterior.com/blog/interior-design-trends-2026/): Latest interior design trends shaping homes in Chennai
- [Multiple Wallpaper Design Ideas](https://vbminterior.com/blog/multiple-wallpaper-design-ideas/): Creative wallpaper ideas for every room
- [Small Spaces, Big Style](https://vbminterior.com/blog/small-spaces-big-style/): Design tips for compact living spaces
- [Creating Affordable Luxury](https://vbminterior.com/blog/creating-affordable-luxury/): How to achieve luxury interiors on a budget
- [Best Interior Designers in Chennai 2026](https://vbminterior.com/blog/best-interior-designers-chennai-2026/): Guide to choosing the best interior designers
- [Modular Kitchen Design Chennai Guide](https://vbminterior.com/blog/modular-kitchen-design-chennai-guide/): Complete guide to modular kitchen design
- [Interior Design Cost Chennai 2026](https://vbminterior.com/blog/interior-design-cost-chennai-2026/): Complete price guide for interiors in Chennai
- [Vastu-Compliant Interior Design](https://vbminterior.com/blog/vastu-compliant-interior-design-chennai/): Vastu guide for Chennai homes
- [False Ceiling Designs](https://vbminterior.com/blog/false-ceiling-designs-types-costs-ideas/): Types, costs & 2026 ideas for every room
- [Wardrobe Design Ideas](https://vbminterior.com/blog/wardrobe-design-ideas-storage-solutions/): Smart storage solutions for every bedroom
- [Interior Design Mistakes](https://vbminterior.com/blog/interior-design-mistakes-waste-money/): 10 mistakes that waste money and how to avoid them
- [Interior Design Timeline](https://vbminterior.com/blog/interior-design-timeline-how-long/): Realistic timeline for Chennai homes
- [Living Room Interior Design Ideas](https://vbminterior.com/blog/living-room-interior-design-ideas-indian-homes/): 2026 inspiration guide for Indian homes

## Areas Served in Chennai

Arumbakkam, T. Nagar, Anna Nagar, Velachery, Adyar, OMR, ECR, Porur, Mylapore, Nungambakkam, Chrompet, Thoraipakkam, Perungudi, Sholinganallur, Guindy, and all Chennai suburbs. Also serving Kancheepuram, Chengalpattu, and Tiruvallur districts.

- Email: vbminterior@gmail.com

- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9AM–7PM, Sunday Closed
